name: Autodesk, Inc.
summary: PART I Note:A glossary of terms used in this Form 10-K appears at the end of this Item1. GENERAL We are a global leader in 3D design, engineering and entertainment technology solutions, spanning architecture, engineering, construction, product design, manufacturing, media, and entertainment. Our customers design, fabricate, manufacture, and build anything by visualizing, simulating, and analyzing real-world performance early in the design process.
